sentences.target: Je survis avec des nouilles ce mois-ci.
sentences.reading: /ʒə syʁvi avɛk de nuj sə mwa si/

translations.fr: Je survis avec des nouilles ce mois-ci.
translations.ipa: /ʒə syʁvi avɛk de nuj sə mwa si/
translations.en: I'm getting by on noodles this month.
translations.de: Diesen Monat komme ich mit Nudeln über die Runden.
translations.it: Questo mese tiro avanti con i noodles.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个月我靠面条过日子。
translations.yue: 我呢個月靠公仔麵捱日子。
translations.ru: В этом месяце я перебиваюсь лапшой.
translations.pt: Este mês estou me virando com macarrão.
translations.tr: Bu ay makarna ile idare ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tháng này tôi sống tạm bằng mì gói.
translations.nl: Deze maand red ik me met noedels.
translations.uk: Цього місяця я виживаю на локшині.
translations.hi: इस महीने मैं नूडल्स पर गुज़ारा कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: W tym miesiącu żyję na makaronie.
translations.el: Αυτόν τον μήνα τη βγάζω με νουντλς.
translations.nb: Denne måneden klarer jeg meg på nudler.
translations.id: Bulan ini aku bertahan dengan mi.
translations.sv: Den här månaden klarar jag mig på nudlar.
translations.ro: Luna asta mă descurc cu tăiței.
translations.da: I denne måned klarer jeg mig på nudler.
translations.ja: 今月は麺でなんとか凌いでいる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; clitic form used before the finite verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses the ongoing action of surviving.
Preposition introducing a comitative/instrumental complement.
Indefinite plural article before a count noun; historically contraction of de + les, but here functions as 'some'.
Common noun, plural; complement of the preposition 'avec'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'mois-ci' to form the expression 'ce mois-ci' ('this month').
Noun 'mois' with demonstrative suffix '-ci'; as a whole forms a deictic NP meaning 'this month'.

sentences.target: On survit grâce au ventilateur aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: On survit grâce au ventilateur aujourd’hui.
translations.en: We're getting by thanks to the fan today.
translations.es: Hoy nos apañamos gracias al ventilador.
translations.de: Heute kommen wir dank des Ventilators über die Runden.
translations.it: Oggi tiriamo avanti grazie al ventilatore.
translations.pt: Hoje estamos nos virando graças ao ventilador.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi cầm cự nhờ chiếc quạt.
translations.nl: Vandaag redden we het dankzij de ventilator.
translations.hi: आज हम पंखे के सहारे गुज़ारा कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα τη βγάζουμε χάρη στον ανεμιστήρα.
translations.nb: I dag klarer vi oss takket være viften.
translations.id: Hari ini kami bertahan berkat kipas angin.
translations.sv: I dag klarar vi oss tack vare fläkten.
translations.da: I dag klarer vi os takket være ventilatoren.
translations.ja: 今日は扇風機のおかげでなんとかしのいでいる。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; grammatically 3rd person singular, often meaning 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Noun used in the fixed multiword preposition 'grâce à' meaning 'thanks to'; semantically marks a favorable cause.
Preposition 'à' fused with the definite article 'le' (à + le → au); introduces the complement 'ventilateur'.
Common noun; object of the prepositional locution 'grâce à'.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the event.

translations.en: I'm trying to survive without air conditioning.
translations.es: Estoy intentando sobrevivir sin aire acondicionado.
translations.de: Ich versuche ohne Klimaanlage zu überleben.
translations.it: Sto cercando di sopravvivere senza aria condizionata.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正努力熬过没有空调的日子。
translations.vi: Tôi đang cố sống sót mà không có điều hòa.
translations.nl: Ik probeer het te redden zonder airco.
translations.hi: मैं बिना एसी के जीवित रहने की कोशिश कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg prøver å overleve uten klimaanlegg.
translations.ro: Încerc să supraviețuiesc fără aer condiționat.
translations.da: Jeg prøver at overleve uden aircondition.
translations.ja: エアコンなしで生き延びようとしています。

tokens.explanation: Elided clitic subject pronoun before a vowel-initial verb (je → j’).
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes 'de' + infinitive complement.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement after 'essayer' ('essaie de survivre').
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'essaie de'.
Preposition expressing absence; introduces the NP 'climatisation'.
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'sans'.

sentences.target: Vous survivez avec trois heures de sommeil.

translations.fr: Vous survivez avec trois heures de sommeil.
translations.en: You're getting by with three hours of sleep.
translations.es: Sobrevives con tres horas de sueño.
translations.de: Du kommst mit drei Stunden Schlaf über die Runden.
translations.it: Te la cavi con tre ore di sonno.
translations.ko: 당신은 세 시간의 잠으로 버티고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你靠三小时的睡眠撑着。
translations.ru: Ты держишься на трёх часах сна.
translations.pt: Você está se virando com três horas de sono.
translations.he: אתה מסתדר עם שלוש שעות שינה.
translations.vi: Bạn đang cầm cự với ba giờ ngủ.
translations.ar: أنت تتدبر أمرك بثلاث ساعات من النوم.
translations.nl: Je redt het met drie uur slaap.
translations.uk: Ти тримаєшся на трьох годинах сну.
translations.hi: तुम तीन घंटे की नींद पर किसी तरह गुज़ारा कर रहे हो.
translations.pl: Dajesz radę na trzech godzinach snu.
translations.el: Τα βγάζεις πέρα με τρεις ώρες ύπνο.
translations.nb: Du klarer deg med tre timer søvn.
translations.id: Kamu bertahan dengan tiga jam tidur.
translations.sv: Du klarar dig på tre timmars sömn.
translations.ro: Te descurci cu trei ore de somn.
translations.da: Du klarer dig på tre timers søvn.
translations.ja: 三時間の睡眠でなんとかしのいでいる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun; 2nd person plural or formal singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural (or polite singular).
Preposition introducing an instrumental/associative phrase.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'heures'.
Common noun, plural; part of a measure phrase 'trois heures'.
Preposition expressing the genitive/complement relation ('hours of sleep').
Common noun; complement of 'de' within the measure NP.

On survit grâce au ventilateur aujourd’hui.
Vous survivez avec trois heures de sommeil.

I'm trying to survive without air conditioning.
You're getting by with three hours of sleep.
